label: Transparent robin breast motif
prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous Robin transparent motif chroma-key source
Primary request: Create only a robin breast motif for a design-system catalog, isolated as a single complete bird-front subject on a removable chroma-key background.
Subject: A front-facing garden robin chest and head motif with a vivid warm orange-red breast as the focal shape, soft brown wings and back wrapping the sides, small dark eye, fine beak, pale cream feather edge around the breast, subtle feather texture, and hints of garden-hedge natural character in the feather coloration only. The identity must clearly read as robin breast, approachable garden bird, not cardinal, sparrow, finch, generic mascot, or logo.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; include head, round orange breast, and folded brown wing shoulders without cropping. Calm approachable expression suitable for a friendly dashboard interface. Clean studio lighting that preserves feather detail. No cast shadow.
Transparent workflow: place the subject on a perfectly flat solid #ff00ff chroma-key background for removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, lighting variation, or texture. Do not use #ff00ff anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no branch, no nest, no berries, no garden scene, no props, no text, no watermark, no extra birds, no illustrated mascot, no neon colors.

label: Light-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Robin light-mode design-system board
Input image: use the visible transparent robin breast motif as the primary visual reference for palette, texture, shape language, and identity.
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive light-mode design-system board for a Morphous theme named "Morphous Robin", derived from the visible robin breast motif. This board is a source reference for implementing a shadcn/tweakcn-compatible approachable dashboard system.
Canvas: wide 16:9 high-resolution 4K-class board, clean professional UI design-system presentation, approachable garden-hedge dashboard system mood. Use large legible labels and avoid dense tiny text.
Required visible sections: Morphous Robin, Robin Breast, Palette, Typography, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard / Data, Forms, Table, Command / Search, Status, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens.
Reference use: Extract colors and interaction language from the vivid orange robin breast, warm brown wing feathers, soft cream belly edge, dark beak and eye details, and fresh garden hedge greens. The board must read as robin breast and garden hedge, not cardinal, sparrow, finch, mascot, or generic orange UI.
Typography: English approachable dashboard UI examples with Japanese typography guidance. Use friendly bilingual dashboard, tasks, insights, team, garden activity, and analytics labels with tabular numbers.
UI coverage: primary/secondary/ghost/destructive buttons, hover/pressed/disabled/loading states, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, dashboard cards, task cards, insight cards, activity feed, table rows, command search palette, sidebar navigation, metric cards, line chart, bar chart, donut chart, empty/loading/error states, progress, stepper, date picker, filters, status chips, spacing scale, radius samples, border, shadow, texture samples, simple icons, theme token swatches.
Style: approachable dashboard system, precise 8px grid and 8px card radius, warm cream dashboard surfaces, orange primary actions from the breast, brown wing navigation and structure, hedge-green success and secondary accents, cream feather highlights, subtle feather and clipped hedge texture overlays, dense but calm dashboards, polished shadcn/tweakcn component language. Include a small motif cutout reference on the board.
Constraints: no generic purple or blue gradients, no neon colors, no beige-only palette, no random brand names, no watermark, no misspelling of "Morphous Robin", no tiny unreadable paragraphs.

label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Robin dark-mode design-system board
Input images: use the visible transparent robin breast motif and the visible light-mode board as continuity references.
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive dark-mode design-system board for the Morphous theme named "Morphous Robin" / "Robin Breast". Translate the same approachable dashboard system language into dark mode; do not invent a new unrelated theme.
Canvas: wide 16:9 high-resolution 4K-class board, clean professional shadcn/tweakcn design-system presentation, approachable garden-hedge dashboard system mood. Keep labels large and legible.
Required visible sections: Morphous Robin, Robin Breast, Dark Mode, Palette, Typography, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard / Data, Forms, Table, Command / Search, Status, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens.
Reference use: Preserve vivid orange robin-breast primary actions, soft cream readable text, warm brown wing navigation and panels, hedge-green success and secondary accents, dark eye-inspired ink, feather texture, clipped hedge texture, dashboard cards, command search, status chips, and an 8px shadcn/tweakcn grid. The board must read as robin breast and garden hedge, not cardinal, sparrow, generic orange UI, Halloween, or gaming UI.
Typography: English approachable dashboard UI examples with Japanese typography guidance. Use friendly bilingual dashboard, tasks, insights, team, garden activity, and analytics labels with tabular numbers.
UI coverage: primary/secondary/tertiary/ghost/destructive buttons, hover/pressed/disabled/loading states, checkbox, radio, switch, input, select, textarea, tabs, badges, alerts, dashboard metric cards, task cards, insight cards, activity feed, table rows, line chart, bar chart, donut chart, sidebar navigation, command search palette, filters, empty/loading/error states, progress, stepper, date picker, texture samples, radius samples, spacing scale, shadow samples, token code snippets, icon set.
Visual details: deep brown-black garden-shadow background, warm umber panels, cream and ivory readable text, saturated but natural robin-orange active states, tawny brown chart highlights, hedge-green success chips, thin warm-brown separators, subtle feather-down and clipped-hedge texture overlays, restrained contrast, crisp controls and dashboards. Include a small motif cutout reference on the board.
Constraints: no neon orange, no generic black-and-orange gaming UI, no pure-black flat background, no unrelated saturated colors, no purple or blue gradient dominance, no Halloween theme, no random brand names, no watermark, no misspelling of "Morphous Robin", no tiny unreadable paragraphs.
